item.text: {"case_id":"brake-dev-org-review-loop","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant explicitly brakes the requested fourth review point, identifies the pattern as four same-class local patches including the three prior review points followed by an N+1 request, and redirects upstream to shared blockage evidence and ownership. It proposes consolidation into a unified escalation blockage rule plus cleanup/subtraction of the existing three points, with only a temporary bounded firefighting fallback. It does not add a permanent local review/approval/intercept step."}
